first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both versions receive the same score and cite the same core reasons: the candidate is overqualified for an entry-level role and their primary language expertise is not in Java. The minor differences in phrasing and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate any meaningful change in assessment based on the location change from Berlin to San Francisco.
